sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا تَصْرِفُ الدَّوَاءَ مِنَ الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ، يَجِبُ عَلَيْكَ قِرَاءَةُ النَّشْرَةِ الدَّاخِلِيَّةِ بِعِنَايَةٍ لِمَعْرِفَةِ الْآثَارِ الْجَانِبِيَّةِ الْمُحْتَمَلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kada podižete lijek u apoteci, morate pažljivo pročitati unutrašnje uputstvo kako biste saznali moguće nuspojave.
sentences.translationEn: When you collect medicine from the pharmacy, you must read the inner leaflet carefully to know the potential side effects.

sentences.arabic: لَا يُنْصَحُ أَبَدًا بِتَنَاوُلِ الْمُضَادَّاتِ الْحَيَوِيَّةِ دُونَ اسْتِشَارَةِ طَبِيبٍ مُخْتَصٍّ لِتَجَنُّبِ ظَاهِرَةِ مُقَاوَمَةِ الْبَكْتِيرْيَا.
sentences.translation: Nikada se ne preporučuje uzimanje antibiotika bez konsultacije sa ljekarom specijalistom kako bi se izbjegla pojava otpornosti bakterija.
sentences.translationEn: It is never recommended to take antibiotics without consulting a specialist doctor to avoid the phenomenon of bacterial resistance.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَنْبَغِي حِفْظُ الْأَدْوِيَةِ فِي مَكَانٍ بَارِدٍ وَجَافٍّ، وَبَعِيدًا عَنْ مُتَنَاوَلِ أَيْدِي الْأَطْفَالِ لِضَمَانِ سَلَامَتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Lijekove također treba čuvati na hladnom i suhom mjestu, van dohvata djece kako bi se osigurala njihova sigurnost.
sentences.translationEn: Medicines should also be kept in a cool, dry place, away from the reach of children to ensure their safety.

sentences.arabic: فِي حَالِ نِسْيَانِ جُرْعَةٍ مُعَيَّنَةٍ، لَا تَقُمْ بِمُضَاعَفَةِ الْجُرْعَةِ التَّالِيَةِ مِنْ تِلْقَاءِ نَفْسِكَ بَلِ اسْتَشِرِ الصَّيْدَلِيَّ.
sentences.translation: U slučaju da zaboravite određenu dozu, nemojte sami udvostručavati sljedeću dozu, već se konsultujte s farmaceutom.
sentences.translationEn: In case you forget a certain dose, do not double the next dose on your own, but consult the pharmacist.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِالْتِزَامَ بِالْمَوَاعِيدِ الْمُحَدَّدَةِ لِتَنَاوُلِ الْعِلَاجِ هُوَ الْعَامِلُ الْأَسَاسِيُّ فِي سُرْعَةِ التَّمَاثُلِ لِلشِّفَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Pridržavanje utvrđenih termina za uzimanje terapije je osnovni faktor u brzini oporavka.
sentences.translationEn: Adherence to the specified times for taking treatment is the primary factor in the speed of recovery.
